tasks.subject: Task 1: Source-tree deletion + edits + label sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove every code path that calls the retired Luma direct API and every test that imports `LumaEngine`/`LumaBackend`; sweep the three peripheral test files that use `provider="luma"` as a free-form `LocalOutputSink` label. Single atomic commit.

**Verify:** `pixi run lint && pixi run format && pixi run typecheck && pixi run test && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` — test count exactly 13 lower than baseline (1670 → 1657).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/luma/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_luma.py", "examples/configs/comparison/luma-t2v.yaml", "src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/test_core_invariant.py", "tests/test_examples.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py", "tests/outputs/test_local.py", "tests/outputs/test_format_filename.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run lint && pixi run format && pixi run typecheck && pixi run test && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["engines/luma gone", "test_luma.py gone", "luma-t2v.yaml gone", "orphan-grep returns 0", "adapter sanity import 0", "gate all green", "count drops by exactly 13", "tree clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: README tombstone + PROGRESS Phase 44 + pyproject orphan cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README tombstone + PROGRESS Phase 44 block + pyproject.toml `lumaai.*` mypy override removal. Three commits in practice: main docs+pyproject commit (5e8a660), tasks.json housekeeping sidecar (c45b270), and a post-review stale-fact fix (2cca9a4 — `three` → `two` Bearer adapters at README:673, caught by independent spec review).

**Verify:** `pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`; mypy `unused section(s): module = ['lumaai.*']` note must be absent.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README heading drops Luma", "bearer-strategy row drops Luma", "Bearer table loses Luma row", "tombstone present", "LUMAAI_API_KEY echo recommented", "Phase 44 block appended", "Phase 43 Task 10 count fixed to 2 of 15", "Phase 43 Task 13 flipped to CLOSED", "RESUME pointer swept", "pyproject.toml orphan lumaai.* mypy override removed", "mypy unused-section note absent", "pre-commit green"]}
```
